sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n51619" key="kagxasth/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">καγχ-αστής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">οῦ</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n51619.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">loud laugher</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1608.tlg001:p.78B" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phryn.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">PS</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.78B.</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:6:29" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.29</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
